title: 8 Pack Muslin Cloths for Baby, 12x12 Inch Muslin Squares Soft Burp Cloths 6 Layers Cotton Newborn Hand Washcloths Baby Wash Cloths Reusable Baby Towels(Blue)
features: 【Soft Material】: Burp cloths for newborn are made of soft cotton fabric, which is soft, and cozy. The muslins size after flattening and stretching is 12 x 12 inch / 30 x 30 cm. Because the baby muslin is pleated, the size measured directly will be smaller.
【6 Layers】: The 6-layer thickening design fabric makes the baby washcloths more absorbent, while also drying faster, not pilling.
【Package Includes】: You can get 8 pcs cotton baby towel, the quantity is sufficient to meet different needs.
【Washable & Reusable】: The muslin cloths for babies can be washable, the more washed the softer.
【Note】: Since the Muslin cloths use a dyeing process, you can wash them with clean water several times after you receive them to avoid fading.
description: Specifications: Material: Cotton Color: Blue Size: 30*30 cm /12*12 Inch Features: 1. The muslin facial cloth can clean up baby faces, it can wipe baby's face, hands, and body. 2. These burp cloths are unisex for boys and girls, easy to clean. 3. The quantity is sufficient to meet different needs, but you need to make some marks to distinguish different uses. Package include: 8 pcs muslin cloths Since the product is made of pure cotton, there will be wrinkles after packaging, resulting in slight size errors.
